🏆 Ranking Guide
⚡ Lightning< 150ms
🚀 Very Fast150-200ms
✨ Fast200-250ms
👍 Average250-350ms
🐢 Slow> 350ms
💡 Tips
Click as fast as possible when the screen turns green! Clicking too early will invalidate the attempt.
